daily.today_energy: You're radiating that main character energy today. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and show the world what you're made of. Trust the vibe.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, your authenticity is your superpower right now. If there's someone on your mind, let your genuine self do the talking.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different today. Don't sleep on that creative spark—jot it down, sketch it out, or share it. Your momentum is real and people are paying attention.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Even a walk clears your head in ways you didn't expect. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than obligatory.

weekly.overview: The cosmos is basically asking you to pause before you sprint, Aries. This week, your usual fire gets channeled into something more intentional. Mercury's movement suggests you'll finally understand something that's been bugging you.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person needs you to actually listen this week—not just wait for your turn to talk. Single? Someone intriguing is in your orbit, but they're not going to chase. You've got to show up differently.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now, but timing matters. Don't announce everything at once. Plant seeds strategically and watch what grows. A conversation you've been avoiding is actually your golden ticket.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slower, steadier energy—think walks instead of HIIT, journaling instead of doom-scrolling. Sleep is underrated this week. Prioritize it like it's the most important meeting on your calendar.
